response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership in fintech or regulated environments. Their background in agentic workflows and event-driven systems is relevant, though not at the scale or seniority required for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq).
Proven expertise in event-driven and distributed systems (e.g., microservices at Sociomantic, GISCollective).
Diverse technical background with a focus on scalability and tooling (e.g., dev-ops, CI/CD, observability).
concerns: No explicit CTO-level leadership experience or track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, real-time risk modeling).
Agentic AI work appears more prototypical (e.g., GISCollective) rather than production-grade for high-stakes environments.
